template-herbal-zh.description: Generate a 4K vertical “Herb Exploded Sheet” infographic poster for a single Chinese herb with labeled parts, properties, and modern forms.

template-species-zh.description: Create a cyberpunk-style endangered species knowledge card with six bilingual modules, charts, and a central realistic illustration.

template-character-zh.description: Generate a detailed character concept breakdown board with outfit layers, expressions, props, and handwritten Chinese annotations.

template-weather.description: Render a mini isometric 3D city weather scene with a central landmark and overlaid weather/date/temperature typography in the city’s language.

template-education-zh.description: Turn a topic into an infographic in either cute cartoon-card style or chalkboard sketch style, matching the input language by default.

template-education-card.description: Turn an input topic into a Chinese educational infographic in either cute cartoon style or chalkboard scientific sketch style (3:4).

template-costume-zh.description: Generate a 4K vertical traditional costume professional science illustration (3:4), presenting the specified costume design with detail restoration and visual aesthetics, suitable for science communication and cultural design materials.

template-book-series.description: Generate 6 vertical (3:4) book promotion graphics for Xiaohongshu: cover title, core theme, classic quotes, core viewpoints, character/dimension relationships, and context sorting; all in a unified style, adaptable to different book types.

template-word-scene.description: Generate a richly detailed scene illustration, labeling all objects with English words + IPA + Chinese translations, suitable for English learning visualization.

template-cultural-relic-retro-infographi.description: Generate a 3:4 Chinese-style retro infographic poster centered around hand-drawn illustrations of cultural relics, with quadrants for science communication and extended knowledge areas, elegant and suitable for social media sharing.

template-food.description: Generate a 4K vertical 3:4 food science infographic poster: watercolor hand-drawn main visual + title + production steps + core ingredients + regional culture + local memories.

template-what-if-history.description: Generate a 4K vertical 3:4 retro historical hypothesis infographic poster titled 'What if · History Reversal Plan': watercolor + ink line hand-drawn, warm old paper texture, including a complete structured layout.

template-character-comparison.description: Generate a 3:4 vertical high-definition character profile card: side-by-side ancient and modern comparisons, clean dividing line in the middle, low-saturation high-end typography, detailed illustrations and complete information modules, suitable for character guides/collection cards.

template-battle.description: Generate a vertical traditional style meticulous duel character profile card: split-screen characters A/B, top with avatars and left/right profile information, bottom with iconic items, overall tension maximized.

template-portrait-retouching-blueprint.description: Create a professional portrait retouching blueprint: dual-column layout, left side with unretouched original image + precise red annotations and English instructions, right side with the real natural retouching effect image completed according to annotations.

Use a cute, vivid cartoon style with strong contrast between personalities and clear labels, optimized for viral social media sharing in a vertical 3:4 format.
